name: VeloBridgeDevice
description: A local runner device paired with the Buildy cloud for external action execution

owner_user_id.description: ID of the user who owns the device

owner_email.description: Email of the user who owns the device

label.description: A human-readable label for the device

pairing_token_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the one-time pairing token

token_hint.description: A safe partial hint of the token (e.g. first 4 chars)

runner_public_key.description: The public key generated by the local runner

runner_key_fingerprint.description: A unique fingerprint of the runner's public key

runner_version.description: Version string reported by the runner

verification_challenge.description: A random challenge issued to the runner during pairing

last_check_in_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last successful check-in or heartbeat

capabilities.description: List of capabilities enabled for this device

safety_acknowledged.description: Whether the user has acknowledged the safety terms

emergency_stop_enabled.description: Whether the emergency stop trigger is active
